arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer rumours: Tonali move ignited by Juventus, Real Madrid man eyed
arts.sum: Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali is a January target of Juventus according to fresh reports in Italy this morning. Corriere dello Sport are reporting today that Tonali's name was on a list discussed by Juve directors in a transfer meeting last week and that Nicolò Fagioli and Kenan Yildiz could be sold to help pave the way for a big bid for the ex-AC Milan star.

arts.ttl: I was told I might be out of a job at Newcastle United just days after signing my contract
arts.sum: Round has had spells working as a number two at Arsenal and Manchester United and with the England national team, but the 54-year-old has never forgotten the afternoon he got the call from Sam Allardyce to join 'a massive club' like Newcastle back in 2007. Steve Round has recalled the moment he was informed he might be 'out of a job' at Newcastle United - just a few days after signing a contract to become the club's assistant.

arts.ttl: Sam Fender Newcastle United shirt unveiled as Mags to play in special kit v Brentford
arts.sum: "The anticipation for Sam’s concerts at St. James’ Park continues to build and not only does this allow us to promote his latest album, it gives us another opportunity to offer supporters a piece of Newcastle United history with the auction donations going to support the incredible work that Newcastle United Foundation continues to do across the region.” Following Wednesday’s match, a limited number of the team’s shirts will be signed before being auctioned to raise money for the club’s official charity, Newcastle United Foundation.

arts.ttl: Brentford seemed like ‘certain destination’ for midfielder – Bees on alert as club could hold talks soon
arts.sum: Brentford have been mentioned as a potential suitor for Genoa midfielder Morten Frendrup over the past few months. In October, the Bees were presented as the favourites to land the Dane. There is now an update from Italy about Frendrup, and Brentford will likely be keeping an eye on the situation as transfer drama builds The post Brentford seemed like ‘certain destination’ for midfielder – Bees on alert as club could hold talks soon appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: Newcastle United host Brentford in the Carabao Cup this evening with a place in the semi-finals at stake. arts.sum: Newcastle will look to inflict revenge upon Brentford when the pair lock horns once more with a place in the semi-finals of the EFL Cup up for grabs. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a predict...

arts.ttl: ‘Sudden and radical’ turn of events sees efforts to sign Newcastle United player within weeks
arts.sum: Last week, it was reported in Italy that Sandro Tonali could leave Newcastle United as something had broken in the relationship between the club and the midfielder. The Italian international’s agent Giuseppe Riso later insisted the player isn’t pushing to leave Newcastle United, and attempted to quell the rumours. The talk about Tonali hasn’t died The post ‘Sudden and radical’ turn of events sees efforts to sign Newcastle United player within weeks appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Juventus linked with Sandro Tonali move
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, Juventus have set their sights on Sandro Tonali, with plans to secure the midfielder as early as January. The post Juventus linked with Sandro Tonali move appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United present offer for January signing – Magpies moving concretely, need higher fee
arts.sum: Newcastle United are in the picture to sign Real Valladolid’s Juma Bah in the winter market. That’s according to Sportitalia, and they make it clear this is their own information about Newcastle. Real Valladolid took the 18-year-old on loan from Sierra Leone’s AIK Freetong in the summer. The centre-back has made 10 appearances this season The post Newcastle United present offer for January signing – Magpies moving concretely, need higher fee appeared first on Sport Witness.
